The discussion covers frontier AI models, Nvidia, Google, custom silicon, infrastructure, application software, robotics, GPU economics, and AI business models as the technology transitions from experimentation into broader economic adoption.

title: Alternative(s) to run CUDA on non-Nvidia hardware
content: Several alternatives enable CUDA code to run on non-NVIDIA hardware. AMD's HIP allows conversion of CUDA to portable C++ that runs on AMD GPUs. Intel's oneAPI and DPC++ provide similar cross-platform capabilities. Third-party tools like ZLUDA and CU2CL translate CUDA binaries or source for different architectures. OpenCL remains a vendor-neutral option, though it requires more code changes. Google's TensorFlow and JAX offer hardware-agnostic alternatives for machine learning workloads. These solutions vary in maturity, performance, and ease of migration.

title: 如何评价韩国综合指数一个月从9200跌到6800，120万散户账户爆仓？为什么韩国散户这么容易被强平？
content:
South Korea's KOSPI plunged from 9,200 to 6,800 in one month, triggering mass margin calls for retail investors. Brokerage forced liquidations reached 42.6 billion won in early July, following June's record 1.1 trillion won. Over 1.2 million leveraged retail accounts faced margin calls, with 320,000-360,000 fully liquidated. Retail cash reserves dropped 34 trillion won since June peak to a five-month low.

Mechanisms are standard, but extreme volatility—10 circuit breakers in June alone—and high leverage amplify risks. With only 45% margin requirements on stocks like Samsung, a 20% price drop triggers liquidation. Compounding pressures include Middle East tensions, potential rate hikes, and T+2 forced selling timelines that offer minimal recovery windows.

content: A leaked front-end code on the ICM 2026 website prematurely revealed the Fields Medal winners, including Chinese mathematicians Deng Yu and Wang Hong. The leak has since been fixed, with official confirmation expected on July 23. Wang, a self-taught talent from a small town, proved the century-old Kakeya conjecture. Deng, a competition prodigy, solved Hilbert's sixth problem after 125 years. Both are 2007 Peking University alumni. If confirmed, they would be the first China-born Fields Medalists, with Wang becoming the third female recipient.

title: OpenClaw 使用 codex 额度 5.6 sol 长会话越跑越贵？我做了一个可验证的安全换代器
content: OpenClaw Session Keeper is an open-source tool that safely rotates physical AI sessions during long-running OpenClaw projects to control escalating costs from growing context windows and tiered pricing. It preserves the stable project entry point (sessionKey) while replacing the underlying session (sessionId) when token thresholds are met. The workflow monitors token usage and idle status, backs up transcripts with SHA-256 verification, restores only essential context to the new session, and preserves user-selected model configurations. Any failure halts the process. A built-in cost estimator shows potential savings around 36% in reference scenarios by reducing total tokens processed and eliminating long-context surcharge requests. Security features include no API key storage, read-only database access, parameterized commands, atomic file writes, hash verification, and CI hardening.

title: 市值3000亿美金的巨头，被中国对手盯上了
content: Palantir, a U.S. AI company serving government agencies like the CIA and FBI since 2003, has grown to a $300 billion-plus market cap through its "ontology" knowledge framework, Forward Deployed Engineer delivery model, and 2023 AIP platform. In China, companies like Minglue Technology, Haizhi Technology, and Xunce Technology are pursuing similar "AI to B" strategies, but face structural barriers: weaker customer willingness to pay for intangible software layers, project-based rather than subscription revenue models, and lack of deep industry know-how. Palantir's 20-year accumulation in zero-error scenarios and government contracts is hard to replicate. Chinese contenders fall into four categories—cloud providers, consultants, data governance firms, and industrial AI companies—each possessing only fragmented capabilities. title: 对近期海力士和存储下跌的思考
content:
Analysis of SK Hynix and memory sector decline:

A KIS research report triggered SK Hynix's record 15%+ single-day drop, as its Q2 profit forecast of 60.4 trillion won missed market expectations by ~8%. The core issue: Hynix's heavy reliance on 3-5 year long-term HBM contracts locked in prices, preventing full capture of surging spot DRAM/NAND prices that rose 30-50%. This structural disadvantage in average selling price versus peers with higher commodity memory exposure led to 9-11% earnings cuts for 2026-27.

The sell-off amplified through Korea's derivative structures: ~$20 billion in 2x-3x leveraged single-stock ETFs created short-gamma forced selling, while T+2 settlement delays in margin trading mean forced liquidation pressure may persist. Meanwhile, ADR premiums and global rotation shifted capital from hardware to software/AI plays.

title: 升学宴“降温”背后：白酒大单思维落幕，碎片化微场景崛起
content: Government crackdowns on extravagant graduation banquets have reduced a key summer sales channel for Chinese liquor companies, accelerating industry shift from bulk orders to fragmented consumption. While overall demand remains steady—shown by modest Q1 revenue declines and strong e-commerce growth—consumer behavior is changing: smaller purchases, higher frequency, and preference for micro-scenarios like casual gatherings and solo drinking. Major brands are responding with smaller product sizes, instant retail partnerships, and community-based "drink shops." However, companies remain heavily dependent on traditional distributors and core premium products, making channel transformation difficult. Those with deeply entrenched dealer relationships face the greatest restructuring challenges.

title: Anthropic 将 Fable 5 订阅内免费使用权限延长到 7 月 19 日 周限额提高 50% 活动也跟随延期
content: Anthropic extended free access to its Claude Fable5 flagship model through July 19, up from July 12, and maintained 50% higher weekly rate limits until the same date. During this period, Fable5 usage counts at half toward weekly subscription limits. The move responds to OpenAI's GPT-5.6 launch and aims to rebuild trust after a 19-day government suspension of Fable5 for safety compliance. Anthropic has not provided a timeline for restoring standard subscription access, risking developer defection to competitors if no long-term solution emerges by July 19.

title: Codex 再次进行硬重置且临时取消 5 小时限额
content: OpenAI's Codex performed another forced reset for all paid subscribers without preserving manual reset counts, aiming to fix manual reset issues; compensatory resets will be added later. The action followed expiring gifted resets on July 12, with only ~10% of mobile users completing resets due to interface difficulties. Desktop and updated mobile versions now include reset functionality. title: 开源了一个 Hugging Face 桌面客户端:断点续传下载、支持 hf-mirror、缓存可视化清理,全平台零遥测
content: "Oh My HuggingFace" is an unofficial open-source Hugging Face Hub desktop client for macOS, Windows, and Linux. It supports resumable downloads, multi-threading, queues, and rate limiting with SHA-256 verification. Users can set custom Hub endpoints like hf-mirror.com for China. Features include visual cache management, follow notifications for users/organizations/repositories/papers, keyboard-driven browsing with command palette, model comparison, and one-click export to Ollama, LM Studio, and ComfyUI. The app has zero telemetry, encrypts tokens via system keychain, sandboxed rendering, and stores data locally in SQLite. Currently at v0.0.8, released under Apache-2.0.

title: 字节旗下付费小说 App 红烛故事宣布将停止运营
content: ByteDance's paid novel app Red Candle Stories, operated by Jiangxi Bihuimoying Technology, will shut down between July 9 and August 17, 2026. Paid services end July 9, content updates stop July 10 with automatic refunds for remaining assets. Full platform closure occurs August 17. The app launched just eight months ago and offered both free and paid membership sections.
